title: The Hordes
description: Adds hordes invasions to the world
body:
I was inspired by [this](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-hordes) mod.

I added and removed some feathures from original mod, like infection.

![Loader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/497a72575789b326d74bda2b839cd24cc4d20a5d.png)
![Environment](https://img.shields.io/badge/Environment-Server-blue)

[![Fabric Api](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0268889a033bcf91b471edd30423de48982daeb_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

## Invasions
_You hear the howls of a nearby horde_

![Hordes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ab519cb332e0ca5cfef887e16c405e81b6f9145.png)

On a certain configurable days, hordes of monsters will attack your base in waves as night falls.

For guide about config you can check [here](https://github.com/crystalx375/The-Hordes/wiki#sample-of-config)

ㅤ

**Questions about the mod?**

[My discord](https://discord.com/users/905836655896846406)
